description: Defines the end-to-end SupportIQ AI workflow for ingesting unread support emails, validating parsed email data, tracking workflow execution, performing AI ticket analysis, normalizing AI output, assigning priority, routing tickets, generating reply suggestions, persisting ticket aggregates, sending acknowledgements, completing workflow telemetry, and recording failures.

transaction_model.monitoring_transaction_behavior: Workflow execution telemetry is persisted independently so monitoring and failure state can survive business transaction rollbacks.

stages.name: Email Fetch
stages.operation: Fetch unread emails from the configured IMAP mailbox.
stages.failure_behavior: Connection and fetch failures are converted into failed ingestion results.

stages.name: Ingestion Validation
stages.operation: Validate that the parsed email contains a non-empty Message-ID and body.
stages.failure_behavior: Validation failures are returned as non-retryable failed ingestion results.

stages.name: Workflow Initialization and Email Parsed
stages.operation: Create or continue workflow execution telemetry and establish EMAIL_PARSED as the initial parsed-email stage.
stages.failure_behavior: Duplicate Message-ID processing is rejected when WorkflowService attempts to create a new execution for an already processed email.

stages.name: AI Ticket Analysis Started
stages.operation: Build TicketAnalysisRequest and invoke the configured LLM service.
stages.failure_behavior: Business transaction is rolled back and workflow failure telemetry is recorded.

stages.name: AI Ticket Analysis Completed
stages.operation: Record successful completion of AI ticket analysis.

stages.name: AI Analysis Normalization
stages.operation: Normalize and validate the AI-generated ticket analysis.
stages.failure_behavior: Business transaction is rolled back and workflow failure telemetry is recorded.

stages.name: Priority Assignment
stages.operation: Apply deterministic priority rules to the normalized ticket analysis.
stages.failure_behavior: Business transaction is rolled back and workflow failure telemetry is recorded.

stages.name: Ticket Routing
stages.operation: Route the ticket category to the configured support team.
stages.failure_behavior: Unmapped categories or routing failures roll back the business transaction and record workflow failure telemetry.

stages.name: Reply Suggestion Generation
stages.operation: Generate an AI-assisted customer reply suggestion from the parsed email and normalized analysis.
stages.failure_behavior: Business transaction is rolled back and workflow failure telemetry is recorded.

stages.name: Ticket Aggregate Persistence
stages.operation: Create and persist the ticket, attachments, and initial ticket audit event.
stages.transaction_behavior: WorkflowService commits the business transaction after successful ticket creation.
stages.failure_behavior: WorkflowService rolls back the business transaction and records workflow failure telemetry.

stages.name: Workflow Ticket Association
stages.operation: Associate the persisted ticket identifier with the workflow execution telemetry.

stages.name: Customer Acknowledgement
stages.operation: Send the customer acknowledgement after successful ticket creation when acknowledgement dependencies are configured.
stages.failure_behavior: Acknowledgement failure is logged and workflow execution is marked failed when externally tracked execution telemetry is available.

stages.name: Workflow Completion
stages.operation: Complete workflow execution telemetry after successful ticket processing and acknowledgement handling.

actions: Preserve retry count and retry exhaustion state
Persist workflow execution failure telemetry when execution tracking is available

idempotency.duplicate_behavior: WorkflowService raises DuplicateWorkflowError before creating a duplicate workflow execution.

external_integrations.name: Groq LLM API
external_integrations.purpose: Ticket analysis and AI-assisted reply suggestion generation

external_integrations.name: PostgreSQL
external_integrations.purpose: Ticket, audit, attachment, workflow execution, internal note, and failure recovery persistence

integration_coverage: Email and mocked Groq database workflow
Failed workflow retry and dead-letter recovery
